{{Quote|The Mon Calamari live on a water-covered world. One of their favorite desserts is crab-stuffed creampuffs. With live crabs.|[[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], to Zak Arranda|<ref name="Doom" />}}
'''Crab-stuffed creampuffs''' were a pastry enjoyed by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="Doom" /> who were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].<ref name="Dac" /> The treats were similar to cream-stuffed pastries but were filled with live [[Crab/Legends|crabs]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], crab-stuffed creampuffs were served at the [[Life Day/Legends|Life Day]] celebration of the Mon Calamari [[Bobringi Mafusa]] on the luxury [[Starship/Legends|star-cruiser]] ''[[Star of Empire]]'', but when the ship was evacuated because of [[Engine/Legends|engine]] troubles, the leftover creampuffs were abandoned. After the evacuation of the cruiser, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak Arranda]] found a platter of the creampuffs and eagerly bit into one of the desserts. To his dismay, his mouth was filled with tiny, live crabs, so he spit the creampuff out while shaking the [[Crustacean/Legends|crustaceans]] off himself.<ref name="Doom" />

==Behind the scenes==
Crab-stuffed creampuffs appeared in the tenth installment of [[John Whitman]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Fear]]'' young reader series, [[Galaxy of Fear: The Doomsday Ship|''The Doomsday Ship'']], published in [[1998]].<ref name="Doom" />
